thesis_statement: Theravance Biopharma is a post-restructuring special situation trading at deep discount to net asset value. $329M cash+investments at Q3 2025 ($174M cash + $155M short-term investments) with 50.5M shares = $6.52/share in liquid assets alone vs $13.72 stock price. Company retains 35% stake in YUPELRI royalties + active pipeline (Izencitinib). Lazard hired for strategic review = sale or merger likely. Clark Street Value estimates $17.34 fair value = 26% upside. Special situation: cash/asset discount + M&A catalyst. Primary risk: pipeline burn rate and whether cash endures until deal closes.

thesis_statement: SBLK is a dry bulk shipping company trading at a significant discount to its scrap value ($975M) versus gross debt ($951M). The company benefits from high operating leverage in the shipping cycle and serves essential global trade routes. With global trade normalization expected following potential Strait of Hormuz reopening, shipping demand should strengthen.
